# Design Index

> A fast, curated index for discovering premium design tools, mockups, icons, fonts, color resources, and inspiration.

This file provides a clean map of Design Index (https://designindex.xyz) for Large Language Models (LLMs) and other AI search agents.

---

## Core Directories

- [/tools](https://designindex.xyz/tools): A curated catalog of practical utilities for prototyping, handoff, collaboration, and asset generation.
- [/mockups](https://designindex.xyz/mockups): Premium presentation templates and mockup libraries.
- [/icons](https://designindex.xyz/icons): High-quality curated icon packages, vector sets, and design systems.
- [/fonts](https://designindex.xyz/fonts): Carefully chosen web fonts, variable typography libraries, and foundry resources.
- [/colours](https://designindex.xyz/colours): Dynamic color palette generators, matching utilities, and aesthetic color systems.
- [/illustrations](https://designindex.xyz/illustrations): Curated libraries for modern 2D and 3D illustration assets.
- [/design-inspo](https://designindex.xyz/design-inspo): Design showcases, galleries, and high-fidelity portfolios for inspiration.

---

## Project Pages

- [/about](https://designindex.xyz/about): Background on the Design Index project, built by Atharv Remeshan.
- [/submit-tool](https://designindex.xyz/submit-tool): Submission portal for designers and developers to add their own tools and resources to the index.
- [/feedback](https://designindex.xyz/feedback): Community feedback and feature request page.
- [/terms](https://designindex.xyz/terms): Terms of service and privacy policies.

---

## Search Capabilities & APIs

Design Index features a robust search mechanism with natural language indexing:
- **Search Endpoint**: `/api/search?keywords=keyword1,keyword2`
  - Performs intelligent PostgreSQL keyword overlap searches with custom relevance scoring based on exact title match, starting substrings, and description match.
- **Data Integration**: Integrates a highly responsive backend powered by Supabase and edge-cached with Upstash Redis for instant retrieval.
